data.body:
368c TDD: CLAIMED epic 6d0d + 368c (assignee opus-opcert) after epic PASSED r6 + 368c PASSED r4 (both certified attestations).
RED CONFIRMED (right reason): full opcert oracle (12 tests) run against non-functional stub src/rebar/attest/opcert.py -> 9 behavioral assertions FAIL (verified=False / verdict 'not_implemented' / policy None), 3 guard-asserts pass (non-verification/type checks a stub satisfies). No import errors.
HELD OUT: tests/unit/test_attest_opcert_heldout.py MOVED to job tmp/heldout_stash (subagent cannot read it). Implementer sees ONLY test_attest_opcert.py (kind_registered + sign_verify_roundtrip, both RED) + the stub + ticket intent.
NEXT: launch impl subagent for opcert.py against happy path only; then validate full held-out oracle.
